Explore our products for Web3
development and growth

Practical choice for Web3 projects seeking a balance between cost,
ease of use, and reliable access to blockchain networks

Access 50+ blockchain
protocols with RPC nodes

Get or post data to top blockchain protocols, including
balances, transactions, tokens, smart contracts, etc.

Build without limits with
dedicated nodes

Fully customized and highly performant RPC nodes
deployed on private servers

Major networks & APIs

Connect your dApp to mainnet and testnet networks
with APIs: JSON-RPC, REST, WebSocket, GraphQL, etc.

Advanced monitoring
& statistics

Keep track of methods used and requests made
with a clear, user-friendly dashboard

Major networks & APIs

Connect your dApp to mainnet and testnet networks
with APIs: JSON-RPC, REST, WebSocket, GraphQL, etc.

Build without limits with
dedicated nodes

Fully customized and highly performant RPC nodes
deployed on private servers

Supported protocols

Multi-chain RPC service and APIs, including all top L1 and L2 networks and testnets

View all protocols

Web3 provider delivering
APIs for every use case

Blockchain node provider that guarantees high uptime, cost-effective access,
and low latency for different blockchain-based projects

  • Wallets

    To create multi-chain wallets for seamless interaction and
    transaction validation across blockchain networks

  • NFTs

    To build apps with complete data on NFT collections including
    their metadata, holders, transaction history and token value

  • DeFis

    To manage high transaction volumes, enable data access
    and smart contract interactions, and enhance security

  • Analytics

    To enable transaction analysis and network state evaluations,
    essential for granular and technical blockchain analytics

  • DAOs

    To facilitate real-time data access and transaction processing,
    which are crucial for autonomous nature of DAOs

  • Trading

    For traders to benefit from price movement by integrating
    RPC nodes to trading bots and analytical tooling

with other devs and get 5M RPCs

    unified service that offers access to a
